items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. It kept its price target unchanged at $225. Analyst Patrick Cunningham said the company is well-positioned to benefit from structural lithium demand tailwinds. Citi also remains skeptical that the lit

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: In the next two years, the distribution of lithium demand between electric vehicles and energy storage will be more balanced, said Rio Tinto aluminum and lithium head. Albemarle noted that demand for its energy storage business is steadily growing. Grid energy storage is more eve

items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell, U.S. Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean chemical and mining (SQM.US) down 3%, Sigma Lithium (SGML.US) down over 2%, Lithium Argentina (LAR.US) down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock Could Be 24.6% Undervalued As Cash Flow Improves
items.snippet: With Albemarle trading around $160.35, fair value sits at $212.74. Narrative leans on future earnings, revenue momentum, and sharply different margin profile. However Albemarle's story hinges on lithium prices not staying weak for too long.

items.headline: Albemarle raised to buy at Citi with underappreciated growth opportunities ahead
items.snippet: While supply risk from potential restarts in Western Australia has weighed on equity prices, Citi analyst Pat Cunningham sees Albemarle as one of the primary beneficiaries of structural lithium demand tailwinds given its high-quality assets and conversion network.
